launch_authorization.scope: Public template only. This file documents the expected provider bridge-manifest shape. It is not execution-ready until a human/operator gate records current license/use context, budget, placement, a pushed public-safe commit SHA, provider credentials by reference, and cleanup policy outside public git.

public_template_note: Public template only. This file documents the expected provider bridge-manifest shape. It is not execution-ready until a human/operator gate records current license/use context, budget, placement, a pushed public-safe commit SHA, provider credentials by reference, and cleanup policy outside public git.

repo.commit_or_snapshot_pin_policy: Execution-ready packets must pin an immutable public-safe source ref outside public git.

safety.license_policy: RFdiffusion (BSD) + ProteinMPNN (MIT) only; no AlphaFold 3, no licensed prediction tools
safety.private_data_policy: public PDB only: PD-L1 target slice derived from 4ZQK chain A (UniProt Q9NZQ7 19-127); no private patient data, no licensed databases
safety.public_template_policy: No secrets, concrete provider resources, private volume assumptions, prior-run artifacts, accepted-license state, or launchable startup payloads are encoded in this public manifest.

commands: echo 'Public non-launchable template. Rebuild a private/operator-gated launch packet from tracked source before execution.'

validation_commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('runpod-execution/artifacts')
status = json.loads(Path('runpod-execution/status.json').read_text())
contract = json.loads((base / 'validation' / 'contract-self-check.json').read_text())
assert status['ok'] is True, status
assert contract['ok'] is True, contract
for rel in ['rfdiffusion/rfdiffusion_manifest.json', 'mpnn/sequences.fasta', 'stage-progress.jsonl', 'executed-commands.jsonl']:
    assert (base / rel).is_file(), rel
rfd = json.loads((base / 'rfdiffusion' / 'rfdiffusion_manifest.json').read_text())
assert rfd['num_designs_produced'] >= 1, rfd
PY

workload.description: PD-L1 RFdiffusion binder-design canary (inline_commands payload): 8 backbones against 4ZQK chain A with the 5 strict hotspots (A122,A125,A113,A121,A123), followed by ProteinMPNN sequence design. Plumbing validation before the full 256-design wave.

inputs: Target PDB materialized at runtime from public RCSB 4ZQK chain A residues 19-127
RFdiffusion Complex_base_ckpt.pt baked on campaign NV at /workspace/software/weights/rfdiffusion
stage_contract.resume_policy: Disposable single-shot GPU pod. Re-fire the same inline manifest on failure; the entrypoint is idempotent at the install layer (NV-cached) and stochastic at the design layer (seed pinned).

artifact_validation: validation_commands check status.json and contract-self-check.json both report ok true
expected_artifacts include rfdiffusion/rfdiffusion_manifest.json, mpnn/sequences.fasta, contract-self-check.json, stage-progress.jsonl, executed-commands.jsonl, and the artifact_archive
rfdiffusion_manifest.json reports num_designs_produced >= 1 with sha256 for every design_*.pdb
claim_boundaries: claim_level stays at candidate; produced backbones+sequences are inputs to a downstream Boltz iPTM jury, not a binder claim
no AlphaFold 3, no licensed prediction tools; RFdiffusion is the IPD BSD release, ProteinMPNN is the Baker lab MIT release
input_materialization: Target PDB SHA captured in validation/input-audit.json; chain/resnum range echoed back
Stage contract inlined alongside entrypoint; SHA captured in validation/manifest-preflight.json
RFdiffusion weights manifest written by the entrypoint; fail-closes if Complex_base_ckpt.pt is absent on NV
tool_invocation: executed-commands.jsonl records the exact scripts/run_inference.py invocation, the install commands, and the protein_mpnn_run.py invocations with exit codes
